howTo.title: How to play
howTo.step1Intro: Ladies and gentlemen, alchemists and crypto enthusiasts, gather 'round for the magical journey into the world of {bonkhemist}!
howTo.step1Wallet: First things first, you need to connect your cryptocurrency wallet. This is your magical pouch that holds your precious BONK COIN.
howTo.step2Basic: You start with the basic four: earth, water, fire, and air.
howTo.step2Mix: Select two elements and mix them together. Watch the magic happen as they combine to form something entirely new!
howTo.step2Steam: For example, mix water and fire to get steam.
howTo.step2Cloud: Combine air and water to create a cloud.
howTo.step2Endless: Keep experimenting to discover all the cool and weird combinations. The possibilities are {endless}!!
howTo.step3Adore: Found an element that you absolutely adore? {awesome}!
howTo.step3MintBox: Drag and drop the element into the MAGICAL BONK-BOX to mint it. If it was not already minted, you will be the first owner of this unique element.
howTo.step3BonkCoin: Use your BONK COIN to mint the element. You can mint as many elements as you want, as long as you have enough BONK COIN and the element is not already minted.
howTo.step3OnceMinted: Once minted, the element is yours forever, with its unique value backed by BONK COIN. Congratulations,{br}you now own a piece of {history}!
howTo.step4Clone: Double click an element to clone it.
howTo.step4Delete: Drag an element to the trash can to delete it.
howTo.step4HaveFun: And finally, the most important step of all – {haveFun}!!
howTo.step4Imagination: Let your imagination run wild, mix up a storm, and discover all the fantastical creations Bonkhemist has to offer.
howTo.step4Share: Share your unique elements with friends, show off your minted treasures, and enjoy the magical world of Bonkhemist.

nfts.mintToStart: Mint any element to start your collection!

mintDiscovery.firstOwner: You are now the first owner of:

hero.subhead: Start with four elements. Combine them, let the AI conjure something new, and mint your discoveries as NFTs on Solana.

whatIs.heading: An alchemy game where the recipes don't exist yet.
whatIs.body: Little Alchemy meets Solana. Drag two elements together and an AI invents the result on the spot — a creature, a place, a meme, a god. Any combination nobody has made before is a first discovery, and it's yours to mint forever.

how.heading: Four steps to your first discovery.
how.step1Body: Plug in your Solana wallet — it's your pouch of BONK and the home for everything you mint.
how.step2Body: Start with earth, water, fire and air. Drag two together and watch them bonk into something new.
how.step3Body: The AI dreams up the result. Keep combining to unlock creatures, legends and chaos — the tree never ends.
how.step4Body: Found something nobody else has? Mint it as an NFT on Solana and own that discovery forever.

combos.heading: Two things in. One surprise out.
combos.sub: A few of the thousands of combinations waiting in the tree.

mint.heading: Your discoveries, on-chain forever.
mint.body: Be the first to create something and you're its first discoverer. Mint it and the element becomes a one-of-a-kind NFT — unique AI pixel art, a discoverer badge, registered permanently on Solana.

finalCta.heading: Ready to brew some chaos?
finalCta.body: Four elements. Infinite combinations. One you might be the first to find.
